canonical_byte_algorithm.precondition: validate the closed schema, kind-field contracts, pairwise symbol_id uniqueness, strict symbol order, and sorted unique set-like rows before hashing
canonical_byte_algorithm.symbol_order: strict ascending Unicode scalar sequence by symbol_id
canonical_byte_algorithm.set_order: strict ascending Unicode scalar sequence with no duplicates
canonical_byte_algorithm.object_member_order: ascending Unicode scalar sequence by member name at every object depth
canonical_byte_algorithm.string_encoding: emit JSON mandatory escapes for quotation mark, reverse solidus, and U+0000..U+001F; emit every other Unicode scalar directly as UTF-8 without normalization
steps: remove exactly the top-level canonical_sha256 member
sort symbols by symbol_id and each declared set-like row by Unicode scalar sequence
serialize object members in Unicode-scalar key order using comma and colon separators without spaces
encode the resulting JSON text as UTF-8 and SHA-256 those bytes
